productDisplayName: Timberland Men Toddler Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Crown Point Roll Top boot and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a leather and nubuck upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long. Upper Nubuck upper with leather overlays Roll top collar and tongue with a fabric and leather lining Lace-up system for a customised Fit Complete fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Cushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfort Outsole Non-marking grippy rubber outsole with zig-zag lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for inner arch support Boot care Wipe dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a leather conditioner and nubuck brush to maintain the upper Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
